missingBlock: Oops! It looks like you're missing the '{0}' section. Make sure to type it in!
sizeWrong: Let's adjust the size of '{0}' to {1} pt!
alignmentWrong: Let's fix the text alignment for '{0}'!
listWrong: Let's check the bullets or numbers on '{0}'.
perfectDocument: Perfect formatting! You nailed the whole document.
passedWithErrors: You passed! But there are some things we can improve. Let's head back!
idleMessage: If you're finished formatting, you can press Print in the toolbar!
